name: Worker
description: Hatchet Worker entity, derived from the Hatchet OpenAPI spec.

fields.name: lastHeartbeatAt
fields.description: The time this worker last sent a heartbeat.

fields.name: lastListenerEstablished
fields.description: The time this worker last sent a heartbeat.

fields.name: actions
fields.description: The actions this worker can perform.

fields.name: registeredWorkflows
fields.description: The workflow ids registered on this worker.

fields.name: slots
fields.description: The semaphore slot state for the worker.

fields.name: recentStepRuns
fields.description: The recent step runs for the worker.

fields.name: slotConfig
fields.description: Slot availability and limits for this worker (slot_type -> { available, limit }).

fields.name: dispatcherId
fields.description: the id of the assigned dispatcher, in UUID format

fields.name: labels
fields.description: The current label state of the worker.

fields.name: webhookUrl
fields.description: The webhook URL for the worker.

fields.name: webhookId
fields.description: The webhook ID for the worker.
